settings.title: Settings
settings.fontSizeHint: Adjust the text size for better readability.
settings.dailyReminderDesc: Receive a verse of the day every morning.
settings.darkModeDesc: Enable dark theme for comfortable night reading.
settings.appDescription: Dharma is your personal guide to the Bhagavad Gita, providing daily wisdom and spiritual insights to help you navigate life's challenges with peace and clarity.

manomitra.title: Manomitra
manomitra.subtitle: A calm companion for your mind
manomitra.disclaimer: Manomitra offers emotional support, not medical diagnosis.
manomitra.welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm Manomitra, your calming companion for emotional support. How can I help you today?
manomitra.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
manomitra.botFallback: I'm sorry, I didn't quite understand that.
